hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) cd /Users/alanmaizon/eurydice/backend && /opt/anaconda3/bin/python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/alanmaizon/eurydice/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30 ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py|*.ts|*.tsx) hits=$(grep -in 'logos\|philolog' "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'legacy\|# .*logos\|//.*logos' | head -3); [ -n "$hits" ] && echo "DOMAIN LEAK in $f: $hits" || true ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *session*.py|*state*.py) /opt/anaconda3/bin/python3 -c "import ast; tree=ast.parse(open('$f').read()); enums=[n.name for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n,ast.ClassDef) and 'State' in n.name]; enums and print('State classes:',enums) or print('WARNING: no state machine in $f')" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
summary = data.get('summary', '')
if summary:
    phase_file = '/Users/alanmaizon/eurydice/.current-phase'
    phase = open(phase_file).read().strip() if os.path.exists(phase_file) else 'unknown'
    footer = '\n\nCurrent dev phase: ' + phase + '\n\nContinue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly \u2014 do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with \"I will continue\" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.\n'
    open('/Users/alanmaizon/eurydice/CONTEXT.md', 'w').write('# CONTEXT.md\n\n' + summary + footer)
" 2>/dev/null || true
